case_title: DUNN, FRED J. VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: CONTINUANCE REQUEST FILED BY PLTF. IFP ON FILE. TO BE SIGNED BY COMM. COURT DATE IS LESS THAN 5 DAYS.
REM: PLTF'S CONTINUANCE REQUEST REC'D IN COURT, TO BE RULED AT TRL. ON DEC.19TH-PER COMM, KAPLAN
CONTINUANCE REQUEST FILED BY PLFT FRED DUNN DENIED BY COMMISSIONER. NOTICE OF DENIAL SENT TO PLFT TOGETHER W/ NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUNN, FRED J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HOPKINS, PAUL  C/O SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY DUNN, FRED J. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HOPKINS, PAUL  C/O SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO PAUL HOPKINS RETURNED--NOT AT THIS ADDRESS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-05-2002, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO DEC-19-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 OPERATOR NOT AVAILABLE.
